scripts.setup:
git submodule update --init
MAIN=$(git worktree list --porcelain | head -1 | awk '{print $2}') && [ "$(pwd)" != "$MAIN" ] && ln -sf "$MAIN/.env" .env
pnpm install
scripts.remoteSetup:
git submodule update --init
MAIN=$(git worktree list --porcelain | head -1 | awk '{print $2}') && [ "$(pwd)" != "$MAIN" ] && ln -sf "$MAIN/.env" .env
pnpm install
